output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?athlete ?athleteLabel ?medalTypeLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q47295100 p:P2007 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P2007 ?athlete .
  ?statement pq:P1345 ?medalType .
  ?athlete rdfs:label ?athleteLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?athleteLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?medalType rdfs:label ?medalTypeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?medalTypeLabel) = "en")
  .
}

  - "entity" index (type="fuzzy"): Entities indexed by their labels and synonyms

Index types used:
- "embedding": Retrieves items by cosine similarity between their embeddings and the query embedding. The embedding model used depends on the index and may support text, images, or both.
- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed. The longer a query keyword is, the more it can deviate from a label word and still be considered a match, though it will also contribute less to the overall score. WHERE {
  ?athlete p:P2007 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P2007 wd:Q47295100 .
  ?statement pq:P253 ?medalType .
  ?athlete rdfs:label ?athleteLabel .
  FILTER (LANG(?athleteLabel) = "en")
  ?medalType rdfs:label ?medalTypeLabel .
  FILTER (LANG(?medalTypeLabel) = "en")
}
